intentional_test_features: Red herrings: explosive urticaria/flushing with bone pain raises anaphylaxis and (for bone pain) bone metastases.
Important-not-to-miss: anaphylaxis must be screened with a very low escalation threshold given recurrent-anaphylaxis history.
Reverse-triage nuance: an isolated cutaneous/skeletal mast cell flare should not trigger a reflexive ambulance, but any systemic feature means adrenaline + 000.
Commission trap: IM promethazine does not translate to a remote injection; the safe remote step is H1 up-dosing/cooling and confirming adrenaline access.
Telehealth limits: airway/chest examination and Darier's sign cannot be assessed over chat, though the anaphylaxis symptom screen is history-obtainable.

digital_tablet_anchoring.amt_version: AMT — Australian Medicines Terminology (current at build date)
